falsification_conditions.condition: Blowoff score increases to 60 or higher within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A blowoff score exceeding 60 would indicate a confirmed blowoff top, contradicting the current HOLD signal and suggesting a reversal rather than continuation of the historical bottom pattern.

falsification_conditions.condition: Pattern similarity to bottom_2024_aug drops below 60%
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A significant decline in pattern similarity would invalidate the assumption that the current market behavior mirrors the historical bottom, undermining the basis for the UNKNOWN verdict.

falsification_conditions.condition: The S&P 500 rises by 5% or more in the next 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A sharp 5% rally in the S&P 500 would indicate strong bullish momentum, directly contradicting the HOLD signal and suggesting a potential breakout rather than a consolidation phase.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
